scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "API,ADMIN,VENDOR,PORTAL,MKT,WL-API,WL-ADMIN,WL-PARTNER" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red,white,gray" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:vendor" "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:marketplace" "npm run dev:wl-api" "npm run dev:wl-admin" "npm run dev:wl-partner"
scripts.dev:crm: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,VENDOR,PORTAL" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:vendor" "npm run dev:portal"
scripts.dev:wl: concurrently --names "WL-API,WL-ADMIN,WL-PARTNER" --prefix-colors "red,white,gray" "npm run dev:wl-api" "npm run dev:wl-admin" "npm run dev:wl-partner"
scripts.build: concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,VENDOR,PORTAL,MKT,WL-API,WL-ADMIN,WL-PARTNER" "npm run build:api" "npm run build:admin" "npm run build:vendor" "npm run build:portal" "npm run build:marketplace" "npm run build:wl-api" "npm run build:wl-admin" "npm run build:wl-partner"
